text: Walking through this bright, modern hallway, then stepping into the R+D exhibit, I feel a blend of curiosity and reflection. The blue and orange colors energize my thoughts as I read about responsiveness, development, and technology. Surrounded by words, relic machines, and glowing screens, I sense time stretching between past invention and present contemplation. It is humbling and inspiring to consider how humanity constantly seeks meaning and connection—even as our tools change, our desires remain deeply rooted in togetherness and understanding.
